examples.sentence: 彼の失敗を笑うどころではない。私たちも同じミスをしている。
examples.translation: This is not the time to laugh at his mistakes—we’re making the same ones.
examples.translationEn: This is not the time to laugh at his mistakes—we’re making the same ones.
examples.romaji: Kare no shippai o warau dokoro de wa nai. Watashitachi mo onaji misu o shite iru.

examples.sentence: 病気で寝ている時は、遊ぶどころではない。
examples.translation: When you’re sick in bed, it's far from the time to play around.
examples.translationEn: When you’re sick in bed, it's far from the time to play around.
examples.romaji: Byōki de nete iru toki wa, asobu dokoro de wa nai.

examples.sentence: 試験が近いので、映画を見るどころではない。
examples.translation: Since the exam is coming up, I can’t possibly watch a movie.
examples.translationEn: Since the exam is coming up, I can’t possibly watch a movie.
examples.romaji: Shiken ga chikai node, eiga o miru dokoro de wa nai.

examples.sentence: 仕事が忙しすぎて、旅行なんて考えるどころではない。
examples.translation: I'm way too busy with work to even think about going on a trip.
examples.translationEn: I'm way too busy with work to even think about going on a trip.
examples.romaji: Shigoto ga isogashisugite, ryokō nante kangaeru dokoro de wa nai.

examples.sentence: 明日雨が降るとしたら、傘を持っていきましょう。
examples.translation: If it rains tomorrow, let’s bring umbrellas.
examples.translationEn: If it rains tomorrow, let’s bring umbrellas.
examples.romaji: Ashita ame ga furu to shitara, kasa o motte ikimashō.

examples.sentence: このケーキが美味しくないとしたら、誰も食べないだろう。
examples.translation: If this cake isn’t tasty, probably no one will eat it.
examples.translationEn: If this cake isn’t tasty, probably no one will eat it.
examples.romaji: Kono kēki ga oishikunai to shitara, dare mo tabenai darō.

examples.sentence: 彼が病気だとしたら、早めに病院へ行かないといけません。
examples.translation: If he is sick, he needs to go to the hospital soon.
examples.translationEn: If he is sick, he needs to go to the hospital soon.
examples.romaji: Kare ga byōki da to shitara, hayame ni byōin e ikanai to ikemasen.

examples.sentence: 彼女が学生だとしたら、このレストランは割引があるでしょう。
examples.translation: If she’s a student, there’s probably a discount at this restaurant.
examples.translationEn: If she’s a student, there’s probably a discount at this restaurant.
examples.romaji: Kanojo ga gakusei da to shitara, kono resutoran wa waribiki ga aru deshō.

examples.sentence: 雨が降るとしても、レースは中止しません。
examples.translation: Even if it rains, we won't cancel the race.
examples.translationEn: Even if it rains, we won't cancel the race.
examples.romaji: Ame ga furu to shite mo, rēsu wa chūshi shimasen.

examples.sentence: このケーキが美味しくないとしても、私は食べるつもりです。
examples.translation: Even if this cake isn't delicious, I plan on eating it.
examples.translationEn: Even if this cake isn't delicious, I plan on eating it.
examples.romaji: Kono kēki ga oishikunai to shite mo, watashi wa taberu tsumori desu.

examples.sentence: 彼女が遅刻するとしても、私たちは待ち続けます。
examples.translation: Even if she is late, we will keep waiting.
examples.translationEn: Even if she is late, we will keep waiting.
examples.romaji: Kanojo ga chikoku suru to shite mo, watashitachi wa machitsuzukemasu.

examples.sentence: 忙しいだとしても、友達との約束は守りたい。
examples.translation: Even if I'm busy, I want to keep my promise to my friend.
examples.translationEn: Even if I'm busy, I want to keep my promise to my friend.
examples.romaji: Isogashii da to shite mo, tomodachi to no yakusoku wa mamoritai.

examples.sentence: 彼が来るとともに、パーティーが始まりました。
examples.translation: The party started as soon as he arrived.
examples.translationEn: The party started as soon as he arrived.
examples.romaji: Kare ga kuru to tomoni, paatii ga hajimarimashita.

examples.sentence: 季節が変わるとともに、服のファッションも変わります。
examples.translation: As the seasons change, clothing fashion also changes.
examples.translationEn: As the seasons change, clothing fashion also changes.
examples.romaji: Kisetsu ga kawaru to tomoni, fuku no fasshon mo kawarimasu.

examples.sentence: 成長とともに、いろいろな経験を積むことが大切です。
examples.translation: As you grow, it is important to gain various experiences.
examples.translationEn: As you grow, it is important to gain various experiences.
examples.romaji: Seichou to tomoni, iroirona keiken wo tsumu koto ga taisetsu desu.

examples.sentence: 技術の進歩とともに、便利なアプリが増えています。
examples.translation: With the advancement of technology, the number of convenient apps is increasing.
examples.translationEn: With the advancement of technology, the number of convenient apps is increasing.
examples.romaji: Gijutsu no shinpo to tomoni, benrina apuri ga fueteimasu.

examples.sentence: いつも勉強しているとは限らない。
examples.translation: It's not always true that I'm studying.
examples.translationEn: It's not always true that I'm studying.
examples.romaji: Itsumo benkyou shite iru to wa kagiranai.

examples.sentence: 高い商品がいいとは限らない。
examples.translation: Expensive products are not necessarily good.
examples.translationEn: Expensive products are not necessarily good.
examples.romaji: Takai shouhin ga ii to wa kagiranai.

examples.sentence: 彼が正しいとは限らない。
examples.translation: It's not necessarily true that he is right.
examples.translationEn: It's not necessarily true that he is right.
examples.romaji: Kare ga tadashii to wa kagiranai.

examples.sentence: 雨が降るとは限らない。
examples.translation: It's not necessarily going to rain.
examples.translationEn: It's not necessarily going to rain.
examples.romaji: Ame ga furu to wa kagiranai.

examples.sentence: 彼が来ないことはない。
examples.translation: It's not that he won't come (it's possible that he will come).
examples.translationEn: It's not that he won't come (it's possible that he will come).
examples.romaji: Kare ga konai koto wa nai.

examples.sentence: あの問題が解けないことはない。
examples.translation: It's not impossible to solve that problem (it can be solved).
examples.translationEn: It's not impossible to solve that problem (it can be solved).
examples.romaji: Ano mondai ga tokenai koto wa nai.

examples.sentence: その仕事が難しくないことはない。
examples.translation: That job is not without difficulty (it has some difficulties).
examples.translationEn: That job is not without difficulty (it has some difficulties).
examples.romaji: Sono shigoto ga muzukashikunai koto wa nai.

examples.sentence: 彼女が正しくないことはない。
examples.translation: It's not impossible that she is right (she could be right).
examples.translationEn: It's not impossible that she is right (she could be right).
examples.romaji: Kanojo ga tadashikunai koto wa nai.

examples.sentence: この問題は解けないこともないけど、難しいです。
examples.translation: It's not that I can't solve this problem, but it's difficult.
examples.translationEn: It's not that I can't solve this problem, but it's difficult.
examples.romaji: Kono mondai wa tokenai koto mo nai kedo, muzukashii desu.

examples.sentence: 彼に会わないこともないが、あまり話す時間がない。
examples.translation: It's not that I can't meet him, but there's not much time to talk.
examples.translationEn: It's not that I can't meet him, but there's not much time to talk.
examples.romaji: Kare ni awanai koto mo nai ga, amari hanasu jikan ga nai.

examples.sentence: お金がないこともないけれど、節約した方がいい。
examples.translation: It's not that I don't have money, but it's better to save.
examples.translationEn: It's not that I don't have money, but it's better to save.
examples.romaji: O-kane ga nai koto mo nai keredo, setsuyaku shita hou ga ii.

examples.sentence: このゲームが面白くないこともないが、他のゲームの方が楽しい。
examples.translation: It's not that this game isn't interesting, but other games are more fun.
examples.translationEn: It's not that this game isn't interesting, but other games are more fun.
examples.romaji: Kono geemu ga omoshirokunai koto mo nai ga, hoka no geemu no hou ga tanoshii.

examples.sentence: この映画はとても感動的で、泣かないではいられなかった。
examples.translation: This movie was so touching, I couldn't help but cry.
examples.translationEn: This movie was so touching, I couldn't help but cry.
examples.romaji: Kono eiga wa totemo kandouteki de, nakanai de wa irarenakatta.

examples.sentence: 彼女の笑顔を見ると、笑わないではいられない。
examples.translation: When I see her smile, I can't help but laugh.
examples.translationEn: When I see her smile, I can't help but laugh.
examples.romaji: Kanojo no egao wo miru to, warawanai de wa irarenai.

examples.sentence: この部屋はとても寒いので、震えないではいられない。
examples.translation: This room is so cold, I can't help but shiver.
examples.translationEn: This room is so cold, I can't help but shiver.
examples.romaji: Kono heya wa totemo samui node, furuenai de wa irarenai.

examples.sentence: 彼の話はつまらないが、聞かないではいられない。
examples.translation: His story is boring, but I can't help but listen.
examples.translationEn: His story is boring, but I can't help but listen.
examples.romaji: Kare no hanashi wa tsumaranai ga, kikanai de wa irarenai.
